It's very comfortable. The sides says it's supportive their really not. Needs to be fluffed once in a while to keep it's shape. Otherwise very good.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following categories of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Lack of support: The reviewer mentions that although the sides of the product claim to be supportive, they found that it was not actually the case. This indicates a negative aspect in terms of the product's supportiveness.

2. Shape retention: The reviewer states that the product needs to be fluffed occasionally in order to maintain its shape. This implies a negative aspect regarding the product's ability to retain its shape over time.

Please note that this review only contains two areas of negative feedback.

I love this thing. However I wish it had a different type of foam in it other than the standard egg type-so far itâ€™s fine but wondering how it will hold up over time

1. Foam type: The reviewer expresses a preference for a different type of foam instead of the standard egg type present in the product. While they mention that it's fine so far, they express concerns about how it will hold up over time. This indicates a potential negative aspect in terms of the longevity or durability of the foam used in the product.

Please note that this review specifically mentions the desire for a different type of foam, which is the only category of negative feedback identified.

The reviewer shares a positive sentiment about the product, stating that it is the next best thing since their dog can't get in bed with them anymore. However, it does not mention any negative aspects or concerns about the product.

This product has no supportive edges, itâ€™s just blocky bits of foam that donâ€™t expand at all. Seller please process my refund ASAP this product quality is very disappointing.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following categories of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Lack of supportive edges: The reviewer mentions that the product lacks supportive edges, indicating a negative aspect in terms of the product's design or functionality.

2. Foam expansion: The reviewer states that the foam in the product does not expand at all, suggesting a negative aspect regarding the foam's quality or performance.

3. Refund request: The reviewer requests a refund and expresses disappointment in the product's quality. This indicates a negative aspect in terms of the customer's overall satisfaction and experience with the product.

Please note that this review contains three categories of negative feedback: lack of supportive edges, foam expansion, and disappointment with product quality.
Quality is poor

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following category of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Poor quality: The reviewer mentions that the quality of the product is poor. This indicates a negative aspect in terms of the product's overall construction, materials, or durability.

The size of bed is not 71 inches as advertised, measures 61 inches.  There are no side pockets which were shown in pictures on Amazon site when bought.  The Filler does not lift the sides of the bed and instead lay sideways and parts of surrounding does not have filler in.  Not able to cuddle in like pictures had indicated.  Does not look anything like picture and not worth price.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following categories of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Incorrect size: The reviewer mentions that the size of the bed does not match the advertised dimensions, as it measures 61 inches instead of the advertised 71 inches. This indicates a negative aspect in terms of the product's accuracy and adherence to specifications.

2. Missing features: The reviewer states that the bed does not have side pockets despite being shown in the pictures on the Amazon site at the time of purchase. This implies a negative aspect regarding the product's adherence to the advertised features.

3. Inadequate filler and uneven filling: The reviewer expresses dissatisfaction with the filler of the bed, mentioning that it does not lift the sides as expected and lays sideways. They also note that parts of the surrounding area lack filler. This highlights negative aspects in terms of the product's design, quality of the filler material, and overall comfort.

4. Misleading pictures: The reviewer states that the bed does not resemble the pictures shown on the Amazon site, indicating a negative aspect in terms of the accuracy and representation of the product through visuals.

5. Overpriced: The reviewer mentions that the bed is not worth the price, indicating a negative aspect in terms of the perceived value for the cost paid.

Please note that this review contains multiple categories of negative feedback: incorrect size, missing features, inadequate filler and uneven filling, misleading pictures, and overpriced.

I purchased a similar product that I love but it was out of my color so I ordered this product and I am less than impressed.  If you want a better human dog bed order this instead: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0C5ZXWJ5F?psc=1&ref=ppx_yo2ov_dt_b_product_details

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following category of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Lower satisfaction compared to a similar product: The reviewer mentions that they had purchased a similar product that they loved, but since that product was not available in their desired color, they ordered the product being reviewed. They express being less than impressed with the purchased product, implying a negative aspect in terms of their satisfaction compared to the other similar product they prefer.

Please note that this review specifically mentions lower satisfaction when compared to a different product, which is the only category of negative feedback identified. Additionally, the provided link leads to a different product on Amazon.

It is super soft and comfortable. The walls/baffles sort of flop out to the side so it's just not as cozy as it could be and it has a much huger foot-print than it looks in the photos. So instead of getting the feeling that you're snuggling inside a big furry canoe, it's more like laying on a big furry dinner plate.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following categories of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Wall/baffle structure: The reviewer mentions that the walls or baffles of the product flop out to the side, resulting in a lack of coziness. This indicates a negative aspect in terms of the structural design of the product.

2. Size discrepancy: The reviewer states that the product has a much larger footprint than it appears in the photos. They further describe that instead of feeling like snuggling in a big furry canoe, it feels more like laying on a big furry dinner plate. This suggests a negative aspect in terms of the product's size representation and the resulting comfort experience.

Please note that this review contains two categories of negative feedback: wall/baffle structure and size discrepancy.

So I bought this with great enthusiasm, but sadly what I opened up was NOT what was pictured. The bed itself came fine, but the round tube that's supposed to fluff up and be inserted in the sides was basically full of nothing but crumbled up foam. It was all twisted and crinkly and we gave it time to try and fluff up but it absolutely wouldn't. So now I have to return this thing after we just bought it. Huge waste of time, money and effort! Also there is NO contact information for customer service in the package, so you're forced to go through Amazon to get the refund; you can't even contact them directly and good luck trying to find this company on the internet; they don't exist.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following categories of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Misrepresentation of product: The reviewer mentions that the product they received was not as pictured, indicating a negative aspect in terms of the accuracy of the product representation.

2. Defective tube insert: The reviewer states that the round tube meant to fluff up and be inserted in the sides was filled with crumbled up foam and couldn't properly fluff up. This suggests a negative aspect in terms of the quality or functionality of the tube insert.

3. Difficulty in contacting customer service: The reviewer expresses frustration with the lack of contact information for customer service in the package, making it challenging to directly address their issues. This implies a negative aspect in terms of the availability of customer support and the ease of resolving concerns.

4. Difficulty in getting a refund: The reviewer mentions that they had to go through Amazon to get a refund and had difficulty finding the company's contact information online, suggesting a negative aspect in terms of the refund process and the communication channels available.

Please note that this review contains four categories of negative feedback: misrepresentation of product, defective tube insert, difficulty in contacting customer service, and difficulty in getting a refund.

I purchased this bec it said it's easy to assemble. The zipper was difficult to maneuver and it is quite heavy. I laundered the pillow and blanket. The middle still is raised and even when you lie down on it, it doesn't flatten. I'd like to return it but it's so heavy and bulky! I wouldn't recommend purchasing this at all. I'm quite disappointed bec I had a lot of expectations on it and was actually quite excited to have it especially when the grandkids are around.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the following categories of negative feedback can be identified:

1. Difficult assembly: The reviewer mentions that the zipper of the product was difficult to maneuver, indicating a negative aspect in terms of the ease of assembly.

2. Heavy and bulky: The reviewer expresses that the product is heavy and bulky, which can be perceived as a negative aspect in terms of portability and convenience.

3. Ineffective flattening: The reviewer states that even after laundering the pillow and blanket, the middle of the product remains raised and does not flatten when lying down on it. This indicates a negative aspect regarding the functionality of the product and its ability to provide a comfortable flat surface.

4. Disappointment and unmet expectations: The reviewer expresses disappointment and states that they had high expectations for the product, especially when the grandkids are around. This implies a negative aspect in terms of the product's ability to meet or exceed the reviewer's expectations.

5. Return difficulty: The reviewer mentions that they would like to return the product but find it challenging due to its heavy and bulky nature. This highlights a negative aspect in terms
